name: Sugar 'n Spice Apple Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flours, 1 1/2 cups of sugar, baking powder, salt, and nutmeg in a large bowl.
2. Cut in the shortening until the mixture resembles fine crumbs.
3. In another bowl, combine milk and beaten eggs; gradually add to the dry ingredients.
4. Fold in the chopped apples.
5. Fill greased muffin tins 2/3 full with batter.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes.
7. While the cakes are warm, mix remaining sugar and cinnamon.
8. Dip the tops of the warm cakes in melted butter, then in the cinnamon-sugar mixture. Serve immediately.
